title: neonauclea truncata
intro: Neonauclea truncata, also known as the Katsuragi, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neonauclea truncata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and soothing digestive problems like diarrhea and dysentery. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for various health conditions.
